input.content:
name: Environment Matrix Generator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      config_path:
        description: Path to the matrix config JSON
        required: false
        default: fixtures/basic.json
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CONFIG_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.config_path || 'fixtures/basic.json' }}

jobs:
  generate-matrix:
    name: Generate build matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix-json: ${{ steps.gen.outputs.matrix-json }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester: $($result.FailedCount) failures" }

      - name: Generate matrix
        id: gen
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $cfg = $env:CONFIG_PATH
          Write-Host "Using config: $cfg"
          $json = ./Generate-Matrix.ps1 -ConfigPath $cfg
          Write-Host '----- MATRIX-JSON-BEGIN -----'
          Write-Host $json
          Write-Host '----- MATRIX-JSON-END -----'
          $compact = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 10)
          "matrix-json=$compact" | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT -Append -Encoding utf8

  show-summary:
    name: Show matrix summary
    needs: generate-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Print
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $m = '${{ needs.generate-matrix.outputs.matrix-json }}' | ConvertFrom-Json
          $count = @($m.matrix.include).Count
          Write-Host "MATRIX-COMBO-COUNT=$count"

name: Environment Matrix Generator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      config_path:
        description: Path to the matrix config JSON
        required: false
        default: fixtures/basic.json
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CONFIG_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.config_path || 'fixtures/basic.json' }}

jobs:
  generate-matrix:
    name: Generate build matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix-json: ${{ steps.gen.outputs.matrix-json }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester: $($result.FailedCount) failures" }

      - name: Generate matrix
        id: gen
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $cfg = $env:CONFIG_PATH
          Write-Host "Using config: $cfg"
          $json = ./Generate-Matrix.ps1 -ConfigPath $cfg
          Write-Host '----- MATRIX-JSON-BEGIN -----'
          Write-Host $json
          Write-Host '----- MATRIX-JSON-END -----'
          $compact = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 10)
          "matrix-json=$compact" | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT -Append -Encoding utf8

  show-summary:
    name: Show matrix summary
    needs: generate-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Print
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $m = '${{ needs.generate-matrix.outputs.matrix-json }}' | ConvertFrom-Json
          $count = @($m.matrix.include).Count
          Write-Host "MATRIX-COMBO-COUNT=$count"
